name: FormHelpers
description: Label (field label with required/sublabel/info/help), HintText (helper text below a field, default/error/disabled), and PasswordStrength (genuinely functional strength meter — evaluates a real `password` string for uppercase/number/length rather than displaying a static demo state).
sourceNote: PasswordStrength takes a real `password` prop and computes hasUppercase/hasNumber/hasMinLength itself, rather than an enum matching Figma's 4 static demo states — the Weak/Moderate example screenshots showed some conditions marked unmet even mid-typing in ways that don't generalize as real logic, so a functional evaluation was built instead, matching the project's precedent (DatePicker, ColorPicker) of favoring genuine behavior over literal mockup replication. Label's required-field asterisk uses --primary-base (not error-red), matching the source design exactly.

password.description: Real password value — bars and checklist are computed from it
